subcodes.first_line: O thou scintillating flame of the fire of God's love! The peoples of the world are each veiled by a veil from the manifest Beauty and the sovereign King [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قبسه پرشعله نیران محبت الله اقوام عالم هر یک بحجابی از جمال معلوم و ملیک
subcodes.subjects: @anthropomorphism, @literal interpretation, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @praise and encouragement
